## Summary

Briefly describe the paper, dataset, benchmark, toolkit, or documentation change.

## Placement

- Section:
- Why it belongs there:

## Checklist

- [ ] I searched the README and did not find a duplicate entry.
- [ ] The title and venue match the official paper or project page.
- [ ] The date uses `YYYY.MM.DD` and reflects the first public release.
- [ ] Paper, code, data, and demo links are official and working.
- [ ] The entry follows the existing table format and chronological order.
- [ ] I did not reformat unrelated content.
